programme.title: E3 - A Trinity River Murder
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: E2 - The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: The community of Macon, GA, is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex. Nobody knows where she could be or what could have happened.

programme.title: E3 - A Trinity River Murder
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: The Double Kidnap Of Teddy Wang
programme.desc: The two kidnaps of Hong Kong tycoon Teddy Wang resulted in the world's largest ransoms, and a court battle over his estate between his father and his wife.

programme.title: E2 - Murder In Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: After a successful businessman is brutally strangled, investigators become suspicious of his widow and her secret friend.

programme.title: E15 - Pay Me For My Name
programme.desc: A woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop; and more!

programme.title: E6 - JaRay Wilson
programme.desc: JaRay Wilson texted her mother just minutes before she vanished. For over a year, the teen's friends, family, and community searched for answers.

programme.title: E3 - Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.

programme.title: E7 - Game Over
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: E12 - It's All A Mistake
programme.desc: Speed Racers and a diplomat charge their way into jail while a jealous boyfriend fights his way in. A hungry, homeless man makes a regrettable decision.

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: Reel Life
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Balitanghali
programme.desc: The noontime daily newscast that delivers the hottest news and happenings in the country.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Bubble Gang Fun Size
programme.desc: Features a collection of classic comedy sketches, parodies, and unforgettable moments from the iconic Filipino gag show.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.title: E133 - #SuperPsycho
programme.desc: Nora makes a return and targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam. With nowhere else to turn, Sam and Cat are forced to ask for some unlikely help from Nevel.

programme.title: E201 - The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E707 - Road Trip: From Brad to Worse / Road Trip: Doll Day Afternoon
programme.desc: When the Louds run into Mom's old camp crush turned celebrity at a State Fair, Dad tries to one-up him to impress Rita. // Realizing Mr. Coconuts is missing, Luan rallies the Louds to track him down along Route 66.

programme.title: E108 - Howling Hope / Mar-Smoothie-Lami
programme.desc: Hope makes lots of noise whilst skateboarding, and her howls are heard around the city causing lots of drama. // The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: E114 - Shrinking Stars / FitzPatrick
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer / Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet. // Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: E106 - Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: E110 - School invaders
programme.desc: When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer / Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet. // Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E261 - Lighthouse Louie / Hiccup Plague
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: E101 - Left in the Dark / Get the Message
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: E507 - Cow Pie Kid / Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team. // Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: E110 - School invaders
programme.desc: When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: E909 - Hamalot / Garbage Dumped
programme.desc: After struggling to relate to Shelby's interests, Lance tries to bond with her at a live-action role-play event. // Lana tries to save the town garbage man's job when she finds out the mayor is replacing him with an automated garbage truck.

programme.title: E115 - Super Volcano
programme.desc: Activity in a dormant super volcano under Swellview makes Henry and Ray think the world is ending. Piper is convinced she has a gluten intolerance.

programme.title: E204 - iSaw Him First
programme.desc: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them. This turns out to be more difficult than they imagined and soon their friendship is tested as they compete for his attention.

programme.title: E111 - Musical Mayhem / Purrfect Punch
programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E407 - Zoo U / A Remembrance of Grand-Past
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo. // GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: E304 - Selfie Improvement / No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him!

programme.title: E242 - FarmerBob / Gary & Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay. // Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal - Spot.

programme.title: E101 - Left in the Dark / Get the Message
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: E213 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 2
programme.desc: When B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet that grants him superhero powers, the Thundermans unite to stop his plan. Chloe must reveal her identity to save her friends.

programme.title: E112 - Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: E911 - Hologram Jam / Sick as a Dad
programme.desc: To avoid his responsibilities, Lincoln uses Lisa's hologram device to make it appear like he's doing all of his tasks. // With Mom busy at work, the Loud siblings are tasked with taking care of Dad when he overreacts to getting a cold.

programme.title: E111 - Musical Mayhem / Purrfect Punch
programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E201 - The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E707 - Road Trip: From Brad to Worse / Road Trip: Doll Day Afternoon
programme.desc: When the Louds run into Mom's old camp crush turned celebrity at a State Fair, Dad tries to one-up him to impress Rita. // Realizing Mr. Coconuts is missing, Luan rallies the Louds to track him down along Route 66.

programme.title: E507 - Cow Pie Kid / Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team. // Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: E108 - Howling Hope / Mar-Smoothie-Lami
programme.desc: Hope makes lots of noise whilst skateboarding, and her howls are heard around the city causing lots of drama. // The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: E111 - Musical Mayhem / Purrfect Punch
programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World 'The Jewel Of The Mediterranean, Tunisia'
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

La Brassiere
programme.desc: Samantha, the president of a renowned brassiere company, breaks the tradition and hires two guys, Johnny and Wayne, as brassiere designers, and requires them to submit novel design in 3 months. Lena, is discontent with this decision deliberately make things difficult for them, those two newcomers to the brassiere industry thus act like buffoon. The time is coming. Can those two guys really work out the 'Ultimate Bra'?

programme.title: The Lunatics
programme.desc: Social worker Fun specializes in counseling psychotics. Writer Yip is inspired by his mission and decides to work with him. One day, Fung is accidentally killed by a patient...

programme.desc: Jackie assists the Duke for his exploration of the armour. In his latest hunt, he succeeded to acquire the 'sacred sword'. The terrorists kidnapped his friend in exchange...

programme.title: E7 - My Friend The Dinosaur
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: E8 - An Enchanted Awakening
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. programme.title: E15 - Doggy Diy
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Naestro, De La Rue A L'opera
programme.desc: Nabil Rachdi, known as Naestro, grew up near Marseille. Passionate about boxing, karate and MMA, his life took a different turn when he was arrested for drug trafficking. In prison, he had a revelation: he discovered his tenor voice and began listening to opera. He would become a singer.

programme.desc: The talking animals chat about bedtime.

programme.title: E4 - Nimb Hotel, Copenhagen
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to a hotel in Copenhagen that aims to deliver complete happiness. They visit Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens, where Monica dives to clean a vast tropical aquarium.

programme.title: E3 - New York
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place.

programme.title: E10 - Finale
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their final signature bake, Siba and Paul request 24 glazed petit fours, which highlight distinct South African flavours. The technical challenge comes with a twist that takes the bakers by surprise, and for their last challenge of the season, bakers have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress the judges enough to claim the title.

programme.title: E4 - Nimb Hotel, Copenhagen
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to a hotel in Copenhagen that aims to deliver complete happiness. They visit Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens, where Monica dives to clean a vast tropical aquarium.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city, Florence, he's determined to have a mural.

programme.title: E10 - Finale
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their final signature bake, Siba and Paul request 24 glazed petit fours, which highlight distinct South African flavours. The technical challenge comes with a twist that takes the bakers by surprise, and for their last challenge of the season, bakers have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress the judges enough to claim the title.

programme.title: E111
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E107 - The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E118 - Clock And Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E113 - Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: E226 - The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E123 - The Crew Builds A Fountain Show / The Crew Builds A Carousel
programme.desc: When Sierra Sparkle's big concert stage needs some extra sparkle, Rubble & Crew use a construction complication to make a big splash. // Rubble & Crew decide to go big when Grocer Gabriel wants something special built outside of his grocery store.

programme.title: E116 - Pups Save A School Day / Pups Turn On The Lights
programme.desc: Alex loses his back pack on the first day of school! Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to help him find it. // It's Chase's birthday and the pups are planning a surprise party. A storm causes the power to go out!

programme.title: E318 - Whale Of A Time / The Ice Roll
programme.desc: Sir Steel's noisy underwater antics cause a whale stampede. Deer Squad have to save the lost baby whale after the stampede! // Jade finds some strange footprints that may belong to an Ice Troll and calls the Deer Squad in to investigate.

programme.title: E209 - Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods.

programme.title: E236 - School Bus Trip
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains there is a fantastic view and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes. After a great day out, the bus takes the children home

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E6 - 夫妻創業日漸失和
programme.desc: 節目全新升級，以「老友季」作為主題，把觀察樣本聚焦在情感更濃、羈絆更深的職場戰友身上，對職場上下級關系的維度進行了深度開拓；通過職場老友這一切面，去探討職場中更復雜的問題解法。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E2 - 昆韻幽香 梅開兩代
programme.desc: 聚焦中國優秀文化傳統，講述文化名家和文藝人才的故事及師徒傳習技藝的過程，記錄與展現“名師帶徒”計畫創作成果。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E1 - 失傳傳統技藝pk新派創意
programme.desc: 聚焦18名來自全國一線「主廚」通過不同對戰形式挑戰各類美食命題，加深著觀眾對廚師技能、主廚職業、飲食文化的多重認知。邀請到四位餐飲界頂級大師董振祥、周曉燕、譚綺文、劉一帆，以及代表食客和經營餐飲店的演員袁弘組成評委團，從不同的角度對主廚創作進行品評，見證主廚形象的誕生。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E9 - 男女嘉賓現場鬥舞
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: Inside Afrobeats Culture: Berlin Carnival, Cape Town Dance & Music Hustle
programme.desc: In this week's show, we are at the carnival of cultures in Berlin. And from Berlin to Cape Town to Lagos, we look at how dance and music are connecting cultures across the world.

programme.title: In The Belly Of Ai
programme.desc: Magical, autonomous, all-powerful: Artificial intelligence fuels our dreams and nightmares. While tech companies promise us a better future, AI is already causing serious harm.

programme.title: Can India's King Of Fruits Conquer Europe?
programme.desc: Air freight, strict regulations and prices of up to E22 per kilo: Indian traders are testing whether mangoes can work as a niche product in Europe. Plus: Pakistan's solar boom.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: The Seasons W

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E6 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E5 - Central Victoria
programme.desc: Central Victoria is ‘river & ranges country’, and is an easy drive out of Victoria’s capital, Melbourne. Epic scenery, outstanding natural beauty, lots of history, and down to earth hospitality, our road-trip through Central Victoria does not disappoint.

programme.title: E6 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E5 - Central Victoria
programme.desc: Central Victoria is ‘river & ranges country’, and is an easy drive out of Victoria’s capital, Melbourne. Epic scenery, outstanding natural beauty, lots of history, and down to earth hospitality, our road-trip through Central Victoria does not disappoint.

programme.title: E11 - South Korea
programme.desc: In South Korea, Rooftop and Catfish take on some daring (and borderline stupid) activities. They become the first BMX bikers to every ride at the North Korean/South Korean boarder, scale Korea’s skyscrapers, become sword-smiths, and train in the ancient art of tae kwon do. But the fun doesn’t stop there. The duo find themselves in the center of a mud festival and trying out the tightrope art of jultagi all before testing the strength of their stomachs with some live octopus. With South Korea being the last stop of the season, it looks like Rooftop and Catfish are going to need a long nap back in America.

programme.title: E12 - World Remix
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won’t believe some of the activities that didn’t make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a human run wooden Ferris wheel, try the explosive Columbian game tejo, and last but not least neuter a horse. Enjoy this action packed special of even crazier activities.

programme.title: E5 - Rusty Crayfish
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done fishing, they released them, inadvertently giving the rusty crayfish a new home. Now, the rustys are pushing out the native crayfish, and destroying the weed beds the muskie, pike and walleye depend on. Fishing guide Phil Bauerly sees the destruction daily. To combat the rustys, Phil regularly throws lakeside crayfish boils for family and friends... and Yia just received his invitation to join.

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E5 - Rusty Crayfish
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done fishing, they released them, inadvertently giving the rusty crayfish a new home. Now, the rustys are pushing out the native crayfish, and destroying the weed beds the muskie, pike and walleye depend on. Fishing guide Phil Bauerly sees the destruction daily. To combat the rustys, Phil regularly throws lakeside crayfish boils for family and friends... and Yia just received his invitation to join.

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E5 - Central Victoria
programme.desc: Central Victoria is ‘river & ranges country’, and is an easy drive out of Victoria’s capital, Melbourne. Epic scenery, outstanding natural beauty, lots of history, and down to earth hospitality, our road-trip through Central Victoria does not disappoint.

programme.title: E11 - South Korea
programme.desc: In South Korea, Rooftop and Catfish take on some daring (and borderline stupid) activities. They become the first BMX bikers to every ride at the North Korean/South Korean boarder, scale Korea’s skyscrapers, become sword-smiths, and train in the ancient art of tae kwon do. But the fun doesn’t stop there. The duo find themselves in the center of a mud festival and trying out the tightrope art of jultagi all before testing the strength of their stomachs with some live octopus. With South Korea being the last stop of the season, it looks like Rooftop and Catfish are going to need a long nap back in America.

programme.title: E12 - World Remix
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won’t believe some of the activities that didn’t make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a human run wooden Ferris wheel, try the explosive Columbian game tejo, and last but not least neuter a horse. Enjoy this action packed special of even crazier activities.

E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E1 - Meet the Packs
programme.desc: Connect with the three packs: the large Manzi pack in the lush heartland, the Kakuli pack in the Badlands, and the tiny Stork Colony pack living at the park’s edge. Follow Julz as he shares their victories and defeats in this make-or-break season.

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!

programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E2 - Allies and Adversaries
programme.desc: Feel the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth’s oddest creatures. Dive deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E2 - Florida Keys Shipwreck Trail

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef

programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E4 - July-August - a Time of Migration
programme.desc: Witness some of the planet’s most dramatic natural shifts in July, from the Arctic ice sheets that come crashing down during the summer melt to the feeding frenzy when sockeye salmon reach the end of their journey in Alaska.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Tandem Ng Bayan[Live]
programme.desc: Teleradyo Program

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

Alienoid: The Return to the Future
programme.desc: Ean has become trapped in the distant past while trying to prevent the escape of alien prisoners who are locked up in the bodies of humans. She eventually locates the Divine Blade, which can open a door through time, and sets off to find Thunder in order to return to the present. Meanwhile Muruk, who helps Ean escape various predicaments, is unnerved when he begins sensing the presence of a strange being in his body. Ean and Muruk are pursued by the so-called Sorcerers of Twin Peaks, Madam Black and Mr. Blue, who suspect that a monster lies within Muruk; by the warrior Nong-pa who hopes that the Divine Blade can restore his lost eyesight; and by the sinister Jajang who seeks the Blade for his own ends. Back in the present, the release of an alien substance haava by an escaped alien prisoner known as the Controller results in the death of thousands of people. Min Gaelin who witnesses this by chance comes to realize that this is only the beginning. With only 48 minutes left bef

programme.title: Coffin Homes
programme.desc: Three bizarre tales intertwine in this horror satire set against the housing crisis of Hong Kong, in which the soaring property prices have driven dwellers to take every insane effort necessary to secure a cramped space, even if it means sharing the same roof with the dead.

programme.title: Why me, Sweetie?!
programme.desc: American Chinese Ding studies drama in Beijing. One day, she helps her friend chase after her boyfriend, running vigorously on a Beijing street where she bumps into Dong. The next day, Ding visits Dong, who, strangely enough, denies their acquaintance. Dong's buddy Dr Ching diagnoses his erratic behavior as the protection mechanism of human brain. The only way to lessen the pain is to erase or repress happy memories...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E261 -THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Dot 2 Dot
programme.desc: Chung returns from Canada to a drastically transformed Hong Kong and hoping to capture the city in his childhood years, graffitis a cryptic diagram near every subway station, in the form of dot-to-dot games. Soon they are discovered by Xue, a Putonghua teacher from China determined to solve these riddles as she immerses herself in our city's culture and history...

programme.title: All Shall Be Well
programme.desc: Angie and Pat are a lesbian couple who have been together for over four decades. Pat bought an apartment over thirty years ago where they have lived ever since. The couple is open to their families and often invites Pat's family to their home for dinners. Angie's relationship with them has always been very close. When Pat passes away unexpectedly, Angie is suddenly left on her own to deal with matters related to Pat and her estate. It is not too long before a clash develops over their opinions about the burial arrangements. Angie begins to feel increasingly alienated from Pat's family...

programme.title: Miss Fortune
programme.desc: Ji-hye is a once-successful and beautiful swindler, who recently begins failing with her cons and dreams of changing her small-job life. Before her retirement, she decides to take on one last job which could change her whole life: seducing the son of a wealthy art broker family to steal the golden treasure hidden in their secret mansion. With the help of her daughter Ju-young, she succeeds in earning the trust of the family but it turns out to be a never-ending battle. Can Ji-hye and Ju-young find the legendary treasure and start a new life?

programme.title: Summer Animations: Crayon Shinchan the Movie: The Tornado Legend of Ninja Mononoke
programme.desc: One day, a woman named Chiyome Hesogakure visits the Nohara family with a 5-year-old child called Chinzo. Chiyome claims that she is the actual birth mother of Shinnosuke! But before Misae and Hiroshi figure out the truth, a group of mysterious ninjas come to the Nohara family and take Chiyome and Shinchan away to a Ninja Village! Chiyome tells Shinchan that there is powerful energy stored inside the Earth. To prevent energy loss from the 'Navel of the Earth', descendants of the Hesogakure block it with a pure gold plug by using 'Ninpo: The Art of Mononoke'. The Earth will wither, and the rotation will stop if it comes off! Can Shinchan protect the future of the Earth and the 'tomorrow' of his family?

programme.title: Vital Signs
programme.desc: After being reassigned to a new station along with his superior, Rock Sir, paramedic Wong Wai is assigned to ride with Jerry Ma. At first, Wai is worried that his work performance review would be affected because he doesn't agree with Jerry's way of working. But after some time, Jerry influences Wai to remember once again that the aim of paramedic work is to save every victim. Meanwhile, Jerry, a single father, is hesitating over the future of his daughter, Bonnie. He can't bear to see her leave, but he finally decides to send Bonnie to Canada for schooling. Before she leaves, she tells Jerry that she's worried about being forgotten when she's in Canada, just like her late mother was forgotten. Jerry tries to explain himself, but it's hard to digest such long-gestating grief. At the same time, a serious traffic accident occurs on Tuen Mun highway. Jerry immediately rushes to the scene for the rescue effort. When Wai notices that Rock Sir cares more about taking over command t

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.
